assertions.title: Protected routes remain accessible after sign-in

steps.action: Open /sign-up and submit a unique account (factory.foundation.nav.1776077172@example.com).
steps.expected: Account is created and user is redirected to /dashboard.
steps.observed: Submission never completed; /sign-up remained with disabled fields and Loading button for >20s.

steps.action: Inspect browser console after the stuck sign-up state.
steps.expected: No blocking auth challenge errors.
steps.observed: Console logged "Request for the Private Access Token challenge" and a 401 from Cloudflare challenge platform.

steps.action: Retry prerequisite via /sign-in using the same new email.
steps.expected: If signup succeeded, sign-in should proceed to authenticated routes.
steps.observed: Sign-in returned "Couldn't find your account.", confirming sign-up prerequisite did not complete.

evidence.consoleErrors: Blocked by external auth challenge: Private Access Token challenge with 401 (see auth-console.log).
evidence.network: Cloudflare challenge resource returned 401 during sign-up; auth flow did not progress to dashboard.

assertions.issues: Authentication prerequisite blocked by external challenge; unable to establish authenticated session required for this assertion.

frictions.description: Clerk sign-up in headless agent-browser stalled indefinitely after submit, requiring repeated retries and log inspection not described in user-testing guidance.
frictions.resolution: Retried sign-up and sign-in, waited additional time, and captured blocker evidence (screenshots + console log).

blockers.description: External auth challenge blocked account creation: sign-up remained loading and console showed Private Access Token challenge with 401 from Cloudflare challenge platform.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried sign-up with a unique email, waited >20s, retried via /sign-in, captured console/errors; still blocked.

summary: Tested 14 assigned assertions. All 14 are blocked because authenticated dashboard/header access could not be established due to external auth challenge failure during sign-up.
